description_long: This is a glass bottle with a long neck and a yellow screw cap, featuring a prominent cream-colored label on the front with the brand name 'White Horse' in bold red letters and an image of a white horse. The bottle is filled with a brownish liquid, visible through the transparent glass. The main label wraps around the body, with additional text and barcodes on the back and sides. The neck of the bottle is also wrapped with a yellow label bearing red text. The bottle has a classic whisky or liquor bottle shape, with a rounded shoulder and a slightly wider base for stability. The surface appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light in several areas.
description: A transparent glass bottle with a yellow screw cap, filled with brown liquid and labeled 'White Horse' on a cream background.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back label with detailed text and barcode, yellow cap visible.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the side of the label and the bottle's rounded shape.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main 'White Horse' label and logo clearly, with the yellow cap and neck label.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the edge of the main label and the bottle's curvature.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle features a large cream-colored label with 'White Horse' in bold red letters, an image of a white horse, and additional text and barcodes on the back. The neck has a yellow label with red text.
